Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows markedly elevated creatinine, proteinuria, glucosuria, low urine specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance, suggesting significant renal dysfunction, possibly nephrotic syndrome or diabetic nephropathy, though HbA1c is low. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation for further assessment and management.
